values.value: Flags connected apps that still hold active OAuth tokens but whose installer user is inactive or unknown. An orphaned connected app continues to act under credentials with no owner, allowing stale automation, departed employees' integrations, or unattributed access to persist past offboarding.

Identify the business owner of the connected app. If the app is still required, reassign it to an active owner and document the change. If not, revoke active tokens, block the app from future authorization, and remove it from the inventory. Record the disposition in the finding's resolution notes.
